name: IsoEnergy Ltd.
description: IsoEnergy Ltd. is a leading Canadian uranium exploration and development company with a portfolio of high-grade projects in the Athabasca Basin of Saskatchewan, Canada. The company's flagship asset is the Hurricane zone on the Larocque East property, which hosts the world's highest-grade indicated uranium resource. IsoEnergy is focused on advancing its diverse portfolio of uranium assets in top-tier jurisdictions to support the global transition to clean energy. Led by an experienced management team and board, the company leverages its technical expertise to identify and develop significant uranium deposits.
